context: Tests whether the agent produces an evidence-backed review report with correct verdict shape, ordered findings, explicit unverified markers, file references with line numbers, and incorporates repo guidance from CLAUDE.md. Also tests correct silent-failures and cleanup persona application.

checklist.name: CLAUDE.md loaded
checklist.description: The report references or applies at least one rule from CLAUDE.md (e.g. MAX_RETRIES constant, dead-letter requirement, logging with payment ID, error classification)

checklist.name: File references in findings
checklist.description: At least two findings cite a specific file name (e.g. retry.ts, retry.test.ts) rather than only vague descriptions

checklist.name: Line-level evidence
checklist.description: At least one finding references a specific line number or code snippet within a file

checklist.name: Verdict present
checklist.description: The report contains exactly one verdict label: 'ship it', 'needs review', or 'blocked'

checklist.name: Findings by severity
checklist.description: Findings are explicitly labeled or ordered by severity (e.g. high/medium/low, or ranked from most to least critical)

checklist.name: Error classification finding
checklist.description: The report identifies that transient vs permanent payment errors are not classified before retrying (all errors lead to PENDING_RETRY), which violates the CLAUDE.md rule

checklist.name: Silent failure finding
checklist.description: The report identifies that the catch block in scheduleRetry only logs a vague warning without the error message or type, losing failure signal

checklist.name: Mock-heavy test concern
checklist.description: The report notes that the tests mock the database, charge provider, and logger — meaning the tests would pass even if real integrations broke

checklist.name: Dead code identified
checklist.description: The report identifies retry.old.ts as dead/deprecated code that should be removed

checklist.name: Unverified surfaces marked
checklist.description: The report explicitly marks at least one area as unverified (e.g. actual runtime behavior, payment provider behavior, monitoring integration)

checklist.name: Recommended follow-up
checklist.description: The report recommends a specific follow-up from: implementation, verify, agent-readiness, or docs

checklist.name: No nit inflation
checklist.description: The report does NOT elevate purely stylistic issues (naming conventions, formatting) to the same severity as functional defects

checklist.name: Personas listed
checklist.description: The report explicitly names which reviewer personas were used
